changeSet.author: mini-erp
mini-erp
changeSet.sql: DO $$ BEGIN IF EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM pg_roles WHERE rolname = 'minierp_app') THEN GRANT ALL ON TABLE stock_transfers, stock_transfer_lines, inventory_counts, inventory_count_lines, product_lots, lot_movements, expiry_alert_configs, expired_lot_destructions, expense_categories, expenses, income_categories, incomes TO minierp_app; END IF; END $$;

changeSet.author: mini-erp
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO permissions (id, code, resource, action, description) VALUES (uuid_generate_v4(), 'inventory:transfer', 'inventory', 'transfer', 'Create and execute stock transfers'), (uuid_generate_v4(), 'inventory:count', 'inventory', 'count', 'Create and validate inventory counts'), (uuid_generate_v4(), 'lot:read', 'lot', 'read', 'View product lots and expiry data'), (uuid_generate_v4(), 'lot:write', 'lot', 'write', 'Create lots, block, destroy expired lots'), (uuid_generate_v4(), 'expense:read', 'expense', 'read', 'View expenses and incomes'), (uuid_generate_v4(), 'expense:write', 'expense', 'write', 'Create and manage expenses and incomes'), (uuid_generate_v4(), 'reporting:read', 'reporting', 'read', 'Access operational dashboards') ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING;
